name: SkillGate Agents
short_description: Runtime security for Claude Code agents
long_description: SkillGate Agents enforces capability policies and detects prompt injection across every Claude Code attack surface — MCP tool descriptions, hooks, instruction files, slash commands, memory files, and sub-agents. All enforcement decisions are recorded as Ed25519-signed audit entries. The plugin works transparently via PreToolUse hooks with graceful no-op when the sidecar is unavailable.
attack_surfaces_covered: MCP tool descriptions (injection scan before model exposure)
